{{CargoOrgan
|name=Antigravity Bone
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10840
|idx=45
|description=After 114, 514 failed attempts, the Rebel finally succeeded in creating a portable anti-gravity device. This bone is one of the first gear to apply the technology.
|skill=
|hp=1946
|def=171
|atk=142
|rush=123
|gene1=DMG REDUC +2%
|gene2=CRIT DMG REDUC +5%
|gene3=DMG REDUC +2%
|gene4={race} RUSH +8 per Cell Furnace level-up
Cell Furnace LVL upgraded: 20/20
|gene7=CRIT DMG REDUC +5% (Awakened)
|}}
